title: OmniFormatter lang-go Configuration Schema
description: Configuration for the Go language module. gofmt is opinionated with zero configuration. These settings affect only non-gofmt extensions.

organizeImports.description: Organise and group imports (goimports style). Enabled by default.

endOfLine.description: Line ending style. gofmt uses LF. Override only if your project requires CRLF.

mode.description: 'opinionated' = gofmt byte-for-byte parity. 'advanced' = allows minor config overrides.
